content: 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory systems can be augmented by weighting episodic memory storage retention using the intrinsic reward signals generated by curiosity-driven reinforcement learning methods like ICM and RND, rather than retaining only task-relevant or recency-prioritized memories. This creates a self-augmenting memory system where agents proactively preserve unexpected, information-rich novel memories that improve future active learning performance without explicit extrinsic reward labeling.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
